title: Hour Column Editing
excerpt:
Hello, 
My company operates on 2 shifts. 
1st Shift:    07:00am-07:00pm 
2nd Shift: 07:00pm-07:00am 
Is there a way to adjust the ‘hour’ column filters to adjust for this time? Currently there is only ‘morning’ ‘afternoo…

posts.author: JaredJLY (Jared Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

My company operates on 2 shifts.

1st Shift: 07:00am-07:00pm
2nd Shift: 07:00pm-07:00am

Is there a way to adjust the ‘hour’ column filters to adjust for this time? Currently there is only ‘morning’ ‘afternoon’ and ‘night’, and these times are not clearly specified.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JaredJLY , The filter selections are dependent on the time range in the data. So if you had more data across the span of hours, you’d see

  • Early morning
  • Morning
  • Afternoon
  • Evening
  • night

In my organisation, we have shift labels (label column) for the defined shifts and we filter to that. For example:

The Hour Column – Support (monday.com)
